titles.title: For the Lord Is My Tower

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: For the Lord is my tower And He gives me the power To tear down the works Of the enemy In a difficult hour He will crush the devourer And bring the powers of darkness Underneath my feet

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: /: Blessed be the name of the Lord Blessed be the name of the Lord Blessed be the name of the Lord most high :/

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: The name of the Lord is a strong tower The righteous run into it and they are saved The name of the Lord is a strong tower The righteous run into it and they are saved
